sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33469" key="e)la/fios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐλᾰ´φ-ιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μήν</foreign>),= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ἐλαφηβολιών</foreign>, at Elis, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:13:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.13.11</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
